commit_scope: Remove the Python JSON parse from the regular form-cli synthesis/model-status path and let the native fkwu Form status carry the observed model-lane boundary directly.

commands: bin/form-cli synthesis-status -> synthesis-lane:fkwu-metal-answer-bound; observed full-width-model-logit-generation; missing full-real-llama-gguf-token-generation

scripts/validate_form_cli_local_receipts.sh substrate -> PASS: local grounded ask, semantic-token generation, full-width logit generation, grounded decoded-answer receipts honest; full real Llama GGUF token generator still not claimed
results: The routine synthesis/model-status doorway no longer shells into Python to re-interpret the ask-staged model-call receipt.
The wrapper now relays the native fkwu synthesis-status output and appends only the receipt path.
The local receipt validator accepts the native fkwu-metal-answer-bound lane while preserving the exact available, observed, missing, and prose-generation checks.
